CustomField.description: When enabled, NPPatch automatically creates or updates Affiliation records when a Contact's Account (Organization) field or Primary Affiliation field changes. Specifically: changing a Contact's Account creates a new Affiliation to the new Organization and ends the old one; changing Primary Affiliation updates the Contact's Account field to match. Disabled by default. When disabled, Affiliations must be created and maintained manually. This is the master toggle for all automatic Affiliation management behavior.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Automatically create and update Affiliations when a Contact's Organization or Primary Affiliation changes.
CustomField.label: Automatic Affiliation Management
